name: Jupiter
content:
At the start of 2025, Jupiter was Solana's largest trading venue.

By the end of 2025, Jupiter became the most comprehensive onchain financial platform in all of crypto.

In 12 months, we shipped 10 new product lines. Lend became the fastest-growing platform in Solana history to hit $1B in Total Supply. Perps generated over $250B in annual volume.

Mobile installs grew by nearly 300%. The Developer Platform launched 7 new APIs.

Across it all, Jupiter processed $1T in total volume on just a single chain.

But what defined 2025 wasn't only what we shipped. It was the choices we made along the way.

We burned 30% of the total JUP supply at Catstanbul. We committed 50% of our revenues towards accumulating JUP, and then actioned the DAO vote to burn the holdings.

Companies across the ecosystem and across chains plugged into our world-class trading engine. Robinhood, Coinbase, Uniswap, MetaMask, and most recently SushiSwap announced an integration.

Over the last year, Jupiter became the default infrastructure layer for Solana, and as an extension, for crypto itself.

This full recap covers everything: a product-by-product breakdown with key numbers. Business metrics showing revenue generated across the entire product suite. The state of JUP. And a taste of what's to come.

Read the full 2025 Year in Review here: https://t.co/TfYxoOJGSA

Onwards and upwards,
The Jupiter Team

name: Jupiter
content:
You can currently multiply your INF or JupSOL on Jupiter Lend for over 23.84% APY.

That's roughly 4x what you'd earn from just holding them at ~6.5%.

name: Solana
content:
A national bank opened Solana deposits. A government launched a Solana-backed visa.

From privacy vaults to prediction markets to payroll rails, Solana's infrastructure layer is becoming invisible and the products built on it are becoming undeniable.

Here’s what happened over the week:

📰 Headline News

- @SoFi, the national chartered bank, enabled native Solana network deposits

- @solanapayments launched as a unified hub for Solana payments

- @gmcbhutan launched the first Solana-backed nomad visa

- Solana RWA market cap hit a new ATH of $1.71B

📰 Launches

- @orca_so added PnL and position history to its Liquidity Terminal

- @metaplex introduced the Metaplex App for token discovery and launches

- @mtndao Demo Day featured 30 teams presenting across categories

- @solanamobile debuted @SeekerClaw, enabling less than a minute AI agent deployments

- @IndexifyApp went live on iOS and Android, bringing portfolio tracking to mobile

- @BagsApp introduced the Bags App Store marketplace for developers

- @dflow and @phantom shipped a Claude Code Skill for building Solana apps

- @TradeNeutral unveiled its Debasement Vault designed for monetary neutrality

- @EitherwayAI debuted a describe-to-deploy tool for Solana apps

- @pipenetwork shipped SolanaCDN, an open-source acceleration layer for block delivery

- @printr launched an MCP server enabling AI agents to autonomously deploy and track tokens on Solana

- @Zebec_HQ launched the Zebec SuperApp for USDC-based payroll

- @gauntlet_xyz launched USDC vault on @kamino

- @trytbd released a platform for global polls and prediction markets

- @project0 rolled out 0 Pay, connecting onchain portfolios to IRL payment infrastructure

- @MagicEden transitioned its marketplace focus exclusively on Solana and Packs

- @playdotfunsol released gamified game growth platform for developers and players

- @clawpumptech shipped a V2 upgrade for its agentic gateway

- @glamsystems partnered with @gauntlet_xyz to bring institutional yields to gtUSDa

- @triadmarkets entered its next phase of expansion on Solana

- @reflectmoney introduced Reflect Whitelabel for launching custom yield-bearing stablecoins

- @Noah_HQ partnered with @JupiterExchange to integrate regulated neobank capabilities

- @Solana_Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) announced global high-speed infrastructure buildout plans

- @OnePieceLabs kicked off Solana Bootcamp APAC

- @blueprintAI debuted an AI-driven Smart Savings Account

- @coingecko and @nansen_ai shipped x402-powered APIs, enabling onchain data access for AI agents

📰 Milestones

- @kamino crossed $1B in total RWA market size

- @Sunrise_DeFi hit $360M+ volume and 113K+ wallets since November launch

- @PreStocks total value surpassed $10M

This week's cover art by @foursixsix 🤝

name: Colin Wu
content:
Jeff Yan：诚信和公平不是可以交易的筹码

2 月 19 日 Hyperliquid 创始人 Jeff Yan 在接受 When Shift Happens  频道采访时表示，诚信和公平从来不是需要权衡的决定，若在诚信上妥协、走捷径，确实能发展得更快，比如 FTX 因妥协而短期内迅速扩张。

但他认为在诚信问题上让步，长期代价可能是…

name: Colin Wu
content:
吴说获悉，今日社区流传所谓“X 发布的最新《付费伙伴关系政策》，加密货币行业（Crypto）已被列入 X 禁止推广的行业名单”为虚假信息。

根据网页存档网站 archive 显示，至少自 2024 年 6 月 27 日起，Crypto 就是“不符合付费合作推广资格的行业”。

对比 2024…

name: Colin Wu
content: 据说某二线交易所远程工作监控政策极为严格，搞得像管犯人似的，入职之前要做好心理准备。还听说过两种更奇葩的，远程办公要打开摄像头，离开摄像头要报备，否则 HR 就来找。另一个是办公系统直接公示所有人上班时间排名（整体和团队）。如果你走得比较早，就很羞辱地垫底。

name: 梭教授说
content:
终于顿悟了链上平台的优势了。

空袭伊朗的周末开多黄金，然后昨天平多开空套保。

今天早上再把追多的原油平了，反手开空。

然后在抄底股市。

你们太会赚钱了，能不能带带我，想赚点饭钱啊。

name: 梭教授说
content:
3.02梭哈晨报 ：

这个油价没有出现预期的那么高 ，还算可以 ，最近的运气有点差，打算多看少动了，看不明白这个东西 。

1. $BTC 还是挺相信加密的，毕竟周末属于ta的天下；

2.  $ETH 追高没跑的又被套住了，只能叹息了 ；

3. $SOL 同样的情况在所有主流币身上发生；

4.Aave 治理争议已持续 3 个月，期间 Aave TVL 从 360 亿美元降至 265 亿美元；

5.海湾国家连续第二天遭袭；

6.周末 CME 关闭期间，代币化黄金承担近 100% 的公开价格发现功能；

果然7*24小时的市场就是用来做这个的 ；

7.分析师：黄金将重新成为首选避险资产；

8. @opinionlabsxyz  宣布已完成 S1 赛季快照，S2 赛季现已正式上线；

9.Michael Saylor 再次发布比特币 Tracker 信息，或将再次披露 BTC 增持信息；

但是每次买的越来越少了 ，大家怎么看；

10.Vitalik 提出执行层重构路线，聚焦状态树与虚拟机升级以提升证明效率；

11.Anthropic 被曝推出“迁移提示词”工具，直指 OpenAI 记忆壁垒；

12.X 平台推出“付费合作”标签功能，加强内容透明度；

13.神秘账户精准押注对伊空袭，特朗普阵营陷“内幕交易”指控；

14.美媒：沙特和以色列的施压促使特朗普下令攻击伊朗；

------------
真的没什么人在乎这些 crypto了，一觉起来发现没人提及 ，都是在说原油没有暴涨，速度买入黄金😂

#Bitcoin #Ethereum #Solana #Crypto

name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
content:
Hyperliquid 开原油，有两个，一个是 $OIL (flx)，一个是 $USOIL (km)。 

$OIL 周末开不了，Felix 的设计限制了非交易时段的价格发展，以防止资金费率飙升。

$USOIL 周末可以，但要开需要顶着比较高的费率去开，我是26号17:00开的，目前已经费用金额已经达到保证金的13%（10x杠杆）。

总而言之，周末的这些事情，正在迫使交易员转向使用 Hyperliquid（从 USDH/USDC 的溢价中也可以发现一些端倪）。一切都在利好 $HYPE 。我还是那个想法，逢低买入持有。

name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
content:
之前提过的两个 meme。

西红柿我不好说，我仍然持有，仍然认为它的叙事性很好。后续也有一些变数在的。

这段时间， @PsyopAnime 的影响力算是正式出圈。在我看来，10m以内的市值是明显被低估的。没涨上去的原因无非就两个，一是上面的套牢盘压制，二是链上流动性不足。如果给到低点买入的机会，我还是会继续加仓的。
